name: get_page_insights
description: Fetch analytics and performance metrics for a Facebook Page such as reach, impressions, engagement, and follower growth. Supports daily, weekly, and monthly periods.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Facebook Page to retrieve insights for.

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: Comma-separated metric names (e.g., page_impressions, page_engaged_users, page_fans).

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Aggregation period: day, week, days_28, month, or lifetime.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Unix timestamp or ISO date for the start of the analytics period.

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Unix timestamp or ISO date for the end of the analytics period.

data.name: page_impressions
data.title: Daily Total Impressions
data.description: The total number of impressions seen of any content associated with your Page.
